blocked_items.title: Finny Deploys AI Prospecting Platform Across Osaic's 10,000+ Advisor Network
blocked_items.reason: Fabrication detected: Headline states '10,000+' advisors but the primary source (InvestmentNews) headline explicitly states '11,000 advisors' — a different specific number for the same metric. The Osaic press release uses 'over 10,000' which is consistent with the entry, but the primary source contradicts with 11,000.
